title: Reworked elevators
description: The pack adds some reworked models and GUI changes to core MTR lifts.
body:
This pack reworks some features and looks of core MTR lifts/elevators.

**The pack includes:**

- Reworked Even Lift Doors
- Reworked Odd Lift Doors
- Reworked Even Elevator Displays
- Reworked Call Buttons
- Reworked up/down arrows for lifts
- Some reworked GUI changes

_Some models from IVR were used, I have permission from the owner of IVR to use them in the pack.
The pack is very highly detailed, which might cause some PCs to crash when the pack is equipped. I suggest doing a backup before trying the pack out._

[Join my discord server!](https://discord.gg/UKRFNZYfre)
